data.title: 国际服Arcie小编圣诞服换装回 #7
data.summary: Sensei! CM Arcie's next live stream is on the way! Come join us in the fun as we close out the year
data.body:
Sensei!
CM Arcie's next live stream is on the way!
Come join us in the fun as we close out the year together!

🗓️Date & Time: 12/6 (Wed) 1:00 AM (UTC)
➡️YouTube Link:
